content: Shiki (VS Code's highlighting engine) is the modern standard, with better JSX/TSX fidelity than Prism. Prism v2 development stalled since Aug 2022, effectively inactive. rehype-pretty-code (latest 0.14.3) is the standard rehype wrapper around Shiki for MDX/Markdown pipelines, providing build-time highlighting, line highlighting, and transformer support (incl. copy-button transformer via @rehype-pretty/transformers).
